summary: TWO_COLUMN: Legendre polynomials P_0..P_6 on [-1, 1] via Bonnet recurrence. LEFT axes with YELLOW current P_n via always_redraw + fading BLUE→TEAL history of P_0..P_{n-1}. ValueTracker n_tr steps n=0..6. RIGHT has live <P_n, P_n> computed by np.trapezoid matching 2/(2n+1) and orthogonality note.
